message: fix(stack): stop manifest installers from using caller HOME

files.patch:
@@ -1153,7 +1153,7 @@ modules:
     verified_installer:
       tool: mcp_agent_mail
       runner: bash
-      args: ["--dest", "${TARGET_HOME:-${HOME:-/home/${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}}}/mcp_agent_mail", "--yes"]
+      args: ["--dest", "$TARGET_HOME/mcp_agent_mail", "--yes"]
     install:
       - |
           if ! command -v am >/dev/null 2>&1; then

@@ -216,7 +216,7 @@ install_stack_mcp_agent_mail() {
                     fi
 
                     if [[ -n "$url" ]] && [[ -n "$expected_sha256" ]]; then
-                        if verify_checksum "$url" "$expected_sha256" "$tool" | run_as_target_runner 'bash' '-s' '--' '--dest' "${TARGET_HOME:-${HOME:-/home/${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}}}"'/mcp_agent_mail' '--yes'; then
+                        if verify_checksum "$url" "$expected_sha256" "$tool" | run_as_target_runner 'bash' '-s' '--' '--dest' "$TARGET_HOME"'/mcp_agent_mail' '--yes'; then
                             install_success=true
                         else
                             log_error "stack.mcp_agent_mail: verify_checksum or installer execution failed"

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # ============================================================
 # Data-only manifest index. Safe to source.
 
-ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="381eccb7c0138f92d243055ce30b99e2f297498e1c35032a3f9b1cd7a85182f6"
+ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="b76e84ab1b4f5069ceec52568857c307466186dccdb3bef3e6aae1de538e3ab2"
 
 ACFS_MODULES_IN_ORDER=(
   "base.system"
